subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are servants whom Thou hast chosen for Thy love, whom Thou hast selected for Thy knowledge, and whom Thou hast singled out for Thy servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اخترتهم لمحبتک و اجتبیتهم لمعرفتک و انتخبتهم لعبودیته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
